title: ipomoea adpressa
intro: Ipomoea adpressa, also known as the creeping morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea adpressa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
